name: canvas-text-layer
description: The DOM text-mirror technique from Mozilla PDF.js, extracted as a 13 KB framework-agnostic library. Makes canvas-rendered text searchable (Ctrl+F), selectable, copyable, and fully readable by screen readers. Works with any canvas — Konva, Fabric.js, tldraw, custom renderers.
author: Wen <https://github.com/Wizard-Guido>

scripts.build: bun run build:esm && bun run build:cjs && bun run build:dts
scripts.build:esm: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --format esm --target browser
scripts.build:cjs: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.cjs --format cjs --target browser
